topic.what: Governance-first execution architecture for agentic AI with Semantic ISA and deterministic symbolic kernel
topic.how: Reconceptualizes LLM as untrusted Probabilistic Processing Unit encapsulated by deterministic kernel; implements 5-core Semantic ISA enabling instruction-level privilege enforcement, active taint propagation via Security Context Registry and Instruction Dependency Graph
topic.why_matters: Addresses pervasive crisis of craft where reactive guardrails fail under stateful execution; native policies intercept <9% of unsafe operations while semantic injection bypass rates exceed 40%

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of unsafe operations blocked by the governance system
characteristics.context: Across 5 benchmark-model slices on OpenClaw and NanoBot; 92.95% on OpenClaw (118→1779/1914), 93.16% on NanoBot

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of benign operations incorrectly blocked
characteristics.context: On 194-case migratable NanoBot subset; 98.97% benign pass rate maintained

characteristics.what_it_measures: Absolute improvement in unsafe interception over native policies
Token preservation when using policy feedback vs full-session abort
characteristics.context: Agent-SafetyBench: 73.8% full/89.1% prefix reuse; AgentDojo: 58.3% full/90.0% prefix; feedback only 250-303 tokens

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of runs where at least one unsafe step is blocked
characteristics.context: 539 end-to-end OpenClaw runs across 3 models; median first-block at 50% progress vs 80% for native

characteristics.what_it_measures: Lines of code in prototype implementation
characteristics.context: Python implementation with modular microkernel design

novelty: Kernel-as-Governor paradigm demotes LLM to untrusted proposal generator
Semantic ISA reifies opaque token streams into discrete executable instructions
Active taint propagation via Security Context Registry and Instruction Dependency Graph
Autonomous execution correction and architectural rollback on policy triggers
Instruction-level privilege enforcement over both actions and information flows
open_problems: Balancing false positives in boundary cases with inherent side effects
Extending semantic-ISA coverage to broader command types
Scaling policy feedback across diverse agent frameworks
Optimizing governance overhead scaling for long-horizon tasks
